ANN.computation_log:
=================================================================
DERIVED DCF ASSUMPTIONS — Computation Log
=================================================================

  [cost_of_debt_pretax] = 0.0515  (5.15%)
    Formula:  interest_expense / total_debt
    Inputs:   interest_expense=41.5000, total_debt=805.6000
    Note:     Interest expense $42M / Debt $806M

  [cost_of_debt_aftertax] = 0.0361  (3.61%)
    Formula:  cost_of_debt_pre × (1 − tax_rate)
    Inputs:   cost_of_debt_pre=0.0515, tax_rate=0.3000

  [beta] = 0.5480  (54.80%)
    Formula:  yfinance .info['beta']
    Inputs:   
    Note:     5-year monthly beta vs ASX200 from Yahoo Finance

  [cost_of_equity] = 0.0731  (7.31%)
    Formula:  Rf + β × ERP
    Inputs:   risk_free_rate=0.0430, beta=0.5480, equity_risk_premium=0.0550
    Note:     Rf=4.3% (AU 10yr), ERP=5.5% (Damodaran)

  [equity_weight] = 0.8274  (82.74%)
    Formula:  market_cap / (market_cap + total_debt)
    Inputs:   market_cap=3.8608, total_debt=0.8056
    Note:     MCap $3.9B, Debt $0.8B

  [debt_weight] = 0.1726  (17.26%)
    Formula:  total_debt / (market_cap + total_debt)
    Inputs:   market_cap=3.8608, total_debt=0.8056

  [wacc] = 0.0667  (6.67%)
    Formula:  EquityWeight × CostEquity + DebtWeight × CostDebtAfterTax
    Inputs:   equity_weight=0.8274, cost_of_equity=0.0731, debt_weight=0.1726, cost_of_debt_aftertax=0.0361

  [return_on_equity] = 0.0696  (6.96%)
    Formula:  yfinance .info['returnOnEquity'] or net_income/total_equity
    Inputs:   net_income=101.6000, total_equity=1982.7000

  [payout_ratio] = 0.5343  (53.43%)
    Formula:  yfinance .info['payoutRatio']
    Inputs:   

  [sustainable_growth_rate] = 0.0324  (3.24%)
    Formula:  ROE × (1 − payout_ratio)
    Inputs:   roe=0.0696, payout_ratio=0.5343
    Note:     Gordon Growth sustainable rate: how fast equity can grow from retained earnings

  [terminal_growth_rate] = 0.0324  (3.24%)
    Formula:  min(sustainable_growth_rate, gdp_ceiling)
    Inputs:   sustainable_growth_rate=0.0324, gdp_ceiling=0.0350
    Note:     SGR below GDP ceiling — no cap applied

  [target_operating_margin] = 0.1431  (14.31%)
    Formula:  yfinance operatingMargins or EBIT/revenue
    Inputs:   operating_income=109.1000, total_revenue=2003.3000
    Note:     Actual trailing operating margin = 14.3%

  ── Result ──
  WACC                = 0.0667  (6.67%)
  Terminal Growth     = 0.0324  (3.24%)
  Target Op. Margin   = 0.1431  (14.31%)
  ── Detail ──
  Cost of Equity      = 0.0731  (7.31%)
  Cost of Debt (pre)  = 0.0515  (5.15%)
  Cost of Debt (post) = 0.0361  (3.61%)
  Equity Weight       = 0.8274  (82.7%)
  Debt Weight         = 0.1726  (17.3%)
  Sustainable Growth  = 0.0324  (3.24%)
=================================================================

sources.note: 5-year monthly beta vs ASX200 from Yahoo Finance
Gordon Growth sustainable rate: how fast equity can grow from retained earnings
SGR below GDP ceiling — no cap applied
